description:
Fix Header Shadow for Readability

Update the header's drop shadow styling to use white color instead of its current color, which makes it difficult to read against the background.

Requirements:
- Change the header shadow color to white
- Verify shadow is visible and improves text readability
- Test against different background colors/images that may appear behind the header
- Ensure shadow has appropriate opacity and blur radius for optimal contrast
- Check readability on both desktop and mobile viewports
- Confirm the change doesn't negatively impact accessibility (WCAG contrast requirements)
